flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Western New England University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($40.4k → $47.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Western New England University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($40.4k → $47.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Western New England University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).
